meaning: adj.原子的,原子能的,微粒子的
examples: Each atomic cluster is made up of neutrons and protons.
In Atomic Habits, I wrote, "Humans are herd animals."
In the future, people may heat their homes with atomic power.
Correspondents say this is the International Atomic Energy Agency's toughest report on Iran to date.
But the fact that the molecules can be made and seen confirms long-held fundamental atomic theories.
